title: GAS Email Checker — Setup & Configuration
summary: Complete setup guide for the Google Apps Script email checker. Includes script code, deployment steps, trigger configuration, and Telegram bot integration.

title: Broc Identity & Soul Configuration
summary: Core identity files: SOUL.md (personality and values), IDENTITY.md (name, vibe, emoji), USER.md (Nano's preferences and communication codes).

title: Workspace Tools & Integrations Reference
summary: TOOLS.md — local notes on Gmail Checker config, secret tokens, GAS Web App URL, Telegram chat IDs, and scheduled check times.

title: Mission Control Dashboard Migration
summary: Migration of Mission Control Dashboard from local Next.js to GitHub Pages. Includes static export setup and deployment configuration.

title: OpenClaw Security & Agent Guidelines
summary: Security considerations: prompt injection risks, agent permissions, token management, when to ask before acting. Based on AGENTS.md guidelines.
